description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has a defined face with large eyes and a small nose, and her hair is long, pulled back, and slightly wavy, falling past her shoulders. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and slim pants, both of which appear to be casual and comfortable. Her footwear consists of simple, rounded shoes. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for an urban environment. The figure's proportions and posture suggest a healthy, active adult.
description: A stylized adult woman in casual fitted clothing, standing upright with arms outstretched and long hair pulled back.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, fitted top, slim pants, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length and style of the hair, and the slim silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair falling past the shoulders, and the back contours of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, hair, and the side of the body and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve top and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair pulled back in a loose ponytail
